MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2003 Continued To Mar-24-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Deborah Neville. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Neveo Mosser and there being no appearance by Defendant, Tiffany Sophio Von Arnim the matter is taken off settlement conference, request for jury demand is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
